properties.Observation: During the rainy season when too much water flows, Bank erosion occurs
properties.Description:
Planting trees along the River Bank

Vegetative cover improving around the river bank with Areca nut seedling in 1.5m x 1.5m grid, Kumbuk/ Mee/ Godapara/ Kaduru/ Aththikka/ Wal Del/ Kekuna/ randomly mixed seedlings and planting at 3.5m x 3.5 m grid inter

properties.Scheme: "Dela mada Ella" in the paddy field
properties.Observation: This stream, which flows through the rice fields below the temple, was built long ago using large stones to provide water to the paddy fields. Due to the landslide above the temple due to this cyclone, a large part of the paddy field has been submerged a

Clearing Silt Etc. from Kerbs & Channels (SSCM 12053)
